function.outcome_justification: Exact line item 'operator workflow discovery sprint' appears in four invoices; applying 'since beginning of December 2025' excludes 2025-11-04 (370) and includes 2025-12-02 (185), 2025-12-30 (185), and 2026-02-14 (650), totaling 1020.
